metadata.description: Plugins shipped with the debug-mcp repository.

plugins.name: debug-mcp
plugins.description: Steers Claude Code toward the debug MCP server for interactive native debugging: a hook that nudges away from print-debugging toward live breakpoints/inspection, plus scenario skills for the debug tool surface (launch/attach, breakpoints, stepping, stack/variable inspection, expression evaluation, memory/disassembly, raw LLDB).
